description_long: This house features a whimsical, medieval-inspired design with a prominent round tower capped by a steep, conical roof and accented with timber framing. The main structure is composed of white plaster walls with exposed dark wooden beams, giving it a classic Tudor appearance. The roof is covered in irregular, weathered gray shingles, adding to its rustic charm. Multiple gabled sections and dormer windows punctuate the roofline, while the tower includes a wooden balcony and small, pointed windows. The front entryway is marked by a wooden door set beneath a steeply pitched gable, flanked by timber supports. The overall structure appears multi-leveled, with a mix of rectangular and circular forms creating a visually dynamic silhouette.
description: A whimsical, medieval-style house with a round tower, steep shingled roofs, timber framing, and a prominent gabled entryway. The structure features white plaster walls, dark wood beams, and multiple dormer windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gabled entryway, timber-framed walls, and the round tower with its conical roof and balcony.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full height of the round tower, its wooden balcony, and the steeply pitched roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad expanse of the shingled roof, a small dormer window, and the back wall with minimal openings.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the intersecting gabled roofs, exposed timber framing, and the side elevation of the entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with dormer and tower windows
attribute_entryway_design: Steeply gabled entry with wooden door, timber framing, and no porch or steps visible
